title: 生まれっちまったこの心

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several days have passed since the festival in Oi. As I approach the
school gates for another day of work, I spot a familiar figure.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Uhhh, so if the school gates are here—Wh-whoa! It's you again!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, in the flesh. Uhhh, didn't expect to get found out like this,
but ya see...
choice_data_list: Would you like a campus tour?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ah, for real?! Yeah, I'd really appreciate it! Hehe... now you can see what it's like to show 'round the newcomer.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Wow... I'd heard the rumors, but I wasn't expecting dorms, the gym,
and the cafeteria to be so gigantic... even this training track is
huuuge!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Guess everything really is bigger at Tracen. And I'm not just talkin' 'bout the buildings...

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... huff, puff...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(A partner run, huh? And they're in the homestretch... right 'round the
time where ya figure out when to make your move.)

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Now! Hraaaugh!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (Whoa, already?! It's a li'l early, don'tcha think?)

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: ...No. Not yet!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Ugh, fine. In that case... I'll just outrun you!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Grrraaaaugh!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
I see. Since your final spurt needs work, you tried to trick your
opponent into starting their spurt sooner, thus turning it into a battle
of endurance. Good thinking!

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
In that case, let's focus on increasing your stamina—both in class and
on your own. Now, as for you...

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Congrats on seeing through her trick! You kept calm and saved your
energy for the final push. Now all we have to do is refine your
technique.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
With this, you both have strengths you can use to appeal to
prospective trainers. We'll focus on those while we prep you for the
tryouts!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Okay! Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Did she say tryouts? Hold on... those girls haven't made their debuts
yet?! Tracen students really are on another level...)
Sorry, will you be here much longer? We'd like to use this track.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oh, right. My bad, I'll get outta your wa—huh?

Goodness me... Are you in the middle of a tour? Pardon us for
intruding.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: N-no, I mean, ya haven't done anything worth pardonin'...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(...The heck? Just who... are those two? I'm sensin'... some sorta aura
comin' off of 'em.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hey... you know anything 'bout those two?
choice_data_list: Sure. That's Oguri Cap and Super Creek.
Sure. That's Oguri Cap and Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eager to answer any questions she might have, I explain that Oguri
Cap and Super Creek haven't made their debuts yet, but...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff! Huff, puff! Now it's time to... surge ahead!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Not on my watch!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap & Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hraaaaugh!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(H-hey... wait a minute, what just happened?! I thought the
grey-haired girl didn't have any fight in her, but now she looks ready
to tear the track to shreds!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(And the big girl... It's like she's... a bottomless pit of energy! Their
race is totally suckin' me in—I can't look away!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Just who—or what—are they?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One watches their race with bated breath. I think it's safe to say
their partner race has left an impression.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: You have what it takes to beat them.
You have what it takes to beat them.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Four hundred meters remain! In the lead is Oguri Cap, Oguri Cap! But
Super Creek's right behind her and... She takes the lead!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Will it be Super Creek, Oguri Cap... or Inari One? Inari One surges to
the front!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hraaauuugh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Only two hundred meters left! Will it be Inari One or Super Creek?
The lead goes to...

text_block_list.name: Inari One & Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
URRRAAAUGH!
HRAAAUGH!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Inari One! Inari One is ahead as she... crosses the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The winner of that fiery showdown is none other than Inari One! The
stands greet their champion with a roar worthy of a festival!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(A head-to-head showdown with the best of the best... The crowd
cheerin' so loud, it's like fireworks goin' off in the stands. Among them
would be the chief and everyone back home...)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(If I could win in a place like that, I bet everyone would be smilin' as
they rushed the track to—)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hwaugh?! Ah... Wh-what am I thinkin'...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Sorry, I... I gotta get home!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: ...That girl. I had a feeling this would happen...

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: Nice to see ya again. Now then...

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to make a small request of you. Could you... come to Oi
Racecourse on this day?
